description: An editor needs to assign a breaking news story to the most appropriate available reporter.

nodes.task_description: Review the list of on-duty reporters and their current assignments.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a list of available reporters.

nodes.task_description: Identify a reporter who is not on a deadline and is physically closest to the event.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects the best-positioned reporter for the assignment.

nodes.task_description: Assign the story to the selected reporter in the newsroom management system and send them a notification.

expected_outcome.value: The reporter is officially assigned and alerted.
